review_text: I have been trying to update my nominee for 2 weeks now. The process is confusing and keeps failing at the last step.
Login OTP is not coming on my registered number. Tried 5 times. Support is not responding.
SIP deduction happened but units not reflecting. Worried about my money.
The nominee update screen shows a blank page after submitting documents. Very frustrating.
Completely unable to login for 3 days. OTP issue continues. Is anyone even looking at this?
Good app overall but nominee update is a nightmare. Took me 3 weeks.
My SIP failed this month even though my bank account had sufficient balance. No notification.
Exit load charges are not explained anywhere in the app before redemption. Surprised by the deduction.
Login keeps timing out. Very bad experience.
Why is there no clear breakdown of expense ratio? I had to search the AMFI site myself.
Nominee update feature is broken. Getting error 500 when I submit the form.
App works well but the fee structure is opaque. I want to see all charges upfront.
SIP mandate not activating even after 10 days of bank registration.
Password reset is not working. Stuck in a loop.
I appreciate the clean UI but nominee update should be simpler.
Capital gains statement download fails every time. I need it for tax filing.
OTP not received on email as backup. Phone also not working. Locked out.
SIP pause feature is good but resuming is buggy.
Would be 5 stars if nominee updates were faster.
Exit load deducted on ELSS redemption but I thought lock-in was over. Need clarity.
Login page crashes on Android 14. Been broken for weeks.
Statement download works but the format is confusing for tax purposes.
SIP missed 3 months in a row due to mandate issues. Lost money to timing.
Fee transparency could be better but service quality is good.
Nominee update: submitted documents 4 times, keeps getting rejected without reason.
